title: Demote branch-local PRISM mirrors and remove remaining dual-authority ambiguity
summary: Finish the architectural cleanup that makes shared coordination refs the unambiguous primary authority by clearly treating branch-local .prism and docs projections as mirrors or exports, not competing live truth, and by eliminating remaining code paths that can accidentally re-promote branch-local state into authority semantics.

acceptance.label: Shared coordination refs are the primary live authority in both code and operational behavior.
Branch-local mirrors can no longer quietly act like a second coordination authority during normal development.
